_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 2.5-fold decrease in Cx3cr1 mRNA in Nf1+/- compared to WT optic nerves at 6 weeks of age...trend increase towards increased Cx3cr1 mRNA expression at 3 weeks
details: Successfully detected 2.5-fold decrease in Cx3cr1 mRNA expression in Nf1+/- optic nerves at 6 weeks and trend increase at 3 weeks
